description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, horizontal layout. The exterior features a mix of brown and beige wall panels, large glass windows, and landscaped areas with palm trees and shrubs. The front includes a driveway with a carport and a paved entryway, while the rear showcases a private backyard with a swimming pool and patio seating. The structure is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes multiple outdoor living spaces, such as a covered porch and garden beds. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions, typical of contemporary residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped gardens, a driveway, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and lush greenery.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, chimney, and a mix of garden and paved areas.
description_view_3: Approach view with the driveway, carport, main entrance, and a clear view of the front landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
